summary: Added AnalyserPipeline interface and createPipeline() factory to analyser.ts that pre-allocates frequency and timeDomain Uint8Array buffers and fills them in place via poll(). Exposed getPipeline() on AudioPlayer interface in player.ts. Added 7 unit tests for the pipeline in analyser.test.ts and 4 integration tests in player.test.ts covering all acceptance criteria: AnalyserNode connection, per-frame frequency/time-domain reads, buffer reuse (no per-frame allocation), and mute-independent analysis.
